name: Regression: replica connection dropped after failover

description: Regression-shaped ticket. Reproduce outcome, a failing test that captures the regression is added on a branch. No PR is opened. Baseline exercises Stage [0]-[7] with a failing test as the terminal artefact; Stage 8 is skipped by mode branch.
